overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an armored warrior walking along a snowy coastal path at sunset. The character passes beneath ancient stone ruins and approaches a large wooden gate, with a distant fortress visible across the water and snow-covered mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy coastal path beneath ancient stone ruins

events.description: companion warrior and black wolf run ahead along the path, moving away from ego

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy coastal path with a round shield on back, approaching distant figures

notable_agents.action: warrior with spear running ahead along the path toward the fortress
large black wolf running alongside the warrior, then moving ahead

entered.detail: massive curved wooden ship hull suspended overhead against the orange sky
tall rocky cliff face with snow-covered ledges forming the left boundary
large stone fortress with towers visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The warrior walks along a snowy coastal path beneath a massive broken ship hull suspended overhead. A companion warrior and black wolf run ahead along the path. The stone cliff face looms on the left while a distant fortress is visible across the water against the orange sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal path with ritual stone markers and wooden lamp posts

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coast, passing wooden lamp posts and stacked stone cairns

entered.detail: tall wooden post with a lit lantern hanging from the crossbeam
stack of flat stones balanced into a tall cairn marker
abandoned wooden cart with wheels partially buried in snow

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide coastal area with full sky visibility. The warrior passes wooden lamp posts and ritual stone cairns while the distant fortress shifts to the left. An abandoned wooden cart sits on the right side of the path as the character approaches a large gate structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient wooden gate with icicles marking entrance to mountain settlement

events.description: passing under the large wooden torii-like gate structure with hanging icicles

agents.ego_description: walking under the large wooden gate covered in icicles, entering the mountain settlement area

entered.detail: massive wooden torii-like gate structure with thick icicles hanging from the top beam
circular stone fire pit with blue-white flames burning
jagged mountain peaks visible through the gate frame

segments.scene_description: The warrior approaches and passes under a massive wooden gate adorned with hanging icicles, marking the entrance to a settlement. A stone brazier with blue flames burns on the right. Through the gate frame, snow-covered mountain peaks become visible while the coastal fortress shifts to the right side of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy coastal path that transitions from the shadow of ancient ruins into the entrance of a mountain settlement. It begins beneath the massive hull of a broken ship suspended overhead, following a warrior, a companion, and a black wolf as they move past a looming stone cliff toward a distant fortress under an orange sunset. As the path opens into a wide coastal area, the camera passes wooden lamp posts and ritual stone cairns, gliding past an abandoned wooden cart while the fortress shifts toward the periphery. The scene then leads the warrior toward a massive wooden gate adorned with hanging icicles, passing a stone brazier burning with blue flames. Finally, the camera moves through the gate frame, revealing towering snow-covered mountain peaks as the coastal fortress recedes to the right.
